section.heading: Southern New England Regional Commission
section.chapeau: The region of the Southern New England Regional Commission shall include the following counties:

paragraph.heading: Rhode island.—
paragraph.content: Each county in the State of Rhode Island.

paragraph.heading: Connecticut.—
paragraph.content: The counties of Hartford, Middlesex, New Haven, New London, Tolland, and Windham in the State of Connecticut.

paragraph.heading: Massachusetts.—
paragraph.content: Each county in the Commonwealth of Massachusetts.
